name: Send Gmail
description: Opens a Gmail compose tab in your default browser with To / Subject / Body pre-filled. Review and Send. No password needed — uses your browser session.

variables.subject: Hello from WillettBot
variables.body:
This was sent by an automation I built myself.

Cheers!

actions.label: Launch Gmail compose URL in default browser
Give Gmail a moment to load

actions.message: Review the email in your browser and click Send.
